metadata.description: NCAA Tournament first-round upsets by seed matchup (1985-2025, 64-team era)
metadata.source: Compiled from NCAA.com, Sports Reference, Wikipedia, and verified sports databases
metadata.notes: An 'upset' is when the lower-seeded team (higher seed number) defeats the higher-seeded team (lower seed number). Records reflect through the 2025 tournament first round.

upsets.notes: First ever 16-over-1 upset. Virginia was the overall #1 seed. Jairus Lyles scored 28 points.
FDU entered as 23.5-point underdogs, the largest upset by point spread in tournament history. Sean Moore led with 19 points.
First ever 15-over-2 upset. Eight different Richmond players scored.
Featured freshman Steve Nash, who scored 10 points.
South Carolina was a 17-point favorite. Danny Singletary scored 22 and Antoine Brockington added 20.
Tarvis Williams hit the go-ahead shot with 6.9 seconds left. Iowa State was a 17-point favorite.
CJ McCollum scored 30 points in 39 minutes.
Missouri was a 21.5-point favorite. Kyle O'Quinn had 26 points and 14 rebounds. Only year with two 15-over-2 upsets.
FGCU scored 54 first-half points and went on to reach the Sweet Sixteen as a 15 seed.
Middle Tennessee never trailed despite being a 16-point underdog.
Oral Roberts went on to reach the Sweet Sixteen before losing to Arkansas.
Saint Peter's became the first 15 seed to reach the Elite Eight, beating Murray State and Purdue before falling to North Carolina.
Princeton's second time upsetting Arizona (also 1993 as a different seed). Tosan Evbuomwan scored 15 points. Three consecutive years with a 15-over-2 upset (2021-2023).
First ever 14-over-3 upset. Cleveland State advanced to the Sweet Sixteen.
Two 14-over-3 upsets in the same year.
Game went to triple overtime.
Chattanooga advanced to the Sweet Sixteen.
Largest margin of victory in a 14-over-3 upset (14 points).
Jack Gohlke scored 32 points with 10 three-pointers off the bench.
First ever 13-over-4 upset. David Robinson led Navy.
One of two 13-over-4 upsets in 1987.
Richmond advanced to the Sweet Sixteen.
UCLA had six future NBA players on the roster.
Princeton upset defending national champion UCLA. Gabe Lewullis hit the game-winner with 2.2 seconds left. Coach Pete Carril's final game.
Bryce Drew hit a buzzer-beating three-pointer. One of the most famous shots in tournament history. Valparaiso advanced to Sweet Sixteen.
Trevor Huffman scored 24 points. One of two 13-over-4 upsets in 2001.
UNC Wilmington's first ever NCAA tournament win.
T.J. Sorrentine hit a deep three-pointer in OT to seal it. Vermont's first NCAA tournament win.
Bradley advanced to the Sweet Sixteen.
One of two 13-over-4 upsets in 2008.
Demonte Harper hit a three-pointer with 4.3 seconds left. Kenneth Faried blocked the final shot.
Ohio advanced to the Sweet Sixteen.
La Salle advanced to the Sweet Sixteen, the most recent 13 seed to do so.
Hawaii's first ever NCAA tournament win.
One of two 13-over-4 upsets in 2018. Largest margin 13-over-4 upset since Navy-LSU in 1985.
One of two 13-over-4 upsets in 2021.
Ja Morant recorded a triple-double.
Oregon State went on to reach the Elite Eight as a 12 seed.
High Point's first ever NCAA Tournament win and appearance. The Panthers, in their first year eligible for the tournament, stunned Wisconsin by one point in a thriller.

6v11.notes: The 6v11 matchup is one of the most upset-prone in the tournament. In 1989, all four 11 seeds won. Since 2005, at least one 11 seed has won every year. Six 11 seeds have reached the Final Four (LSU 1986, George Mason 2006, VCU 2011, Loyola Chicago 2018, UCLA 2021, NC State 2024).

upsets.notes: LSU went on to reach the Final Four.
All four 11 seeds won in 1989 — the only year this has happened.
Bobby Knight's last game as Indiana coach. Largest 11-over-6 margin ever (20 points).
George Mason went on to reach the Final Four.
VCU went on to reach the Final Four.
Loyola Chicago went on to reach the Final Four.
UCLA went on to reach the Final Four.
NC State went on to reach the Final Four.

upsets.note: VCU completed the largest first-round comeback in NCAA Tournament history, erasing a double-digit deficit against 6-seed North Carolina before forcing overtime and pulling away for an 82-78 victory. The Rams' stunning rally sent shockwaves through the bracket on Day 1 of the 2026 tournament.

7v10.notes: The 7v10 matchup has an identical upset rate to 6v11. In 1999, all four 10 seeds won. Syracuse became the only 10 seed to reach the Final Four in 2016. The 2021 Oregon vs VCU game was a no-contest due to COVID protocols.

upsets.notes: Largest margin of victory by a 10 seed over a 7 seed.
Part of the only 10-seed sweep in tournament history.
Stephen Curry scored 40 points.
Syracuse became the only 10 seed to reach the Final Four.
One of the highest-scoring tournament games in recent history.

8v9.notes: The 8v9 matchup is the only first-round pairing where the lower seed (9) has a winning record historically. It is essentially a coin flip and the toughest game to predict in bracket pools. All four 8 seeds won in 2015; all four 9 seeds won in 2019. The lowest seed to win the national championship is an 8 (Villanova 1985).

upsets.notes: Part of the first 9-seed sweep since the 64-team era.
Part of the 9-seed sweep in 2019.
FAU went on to reach the Final Four.
